description: M8 eval question set for Verified Research RAG System. 43 questions validated against the arXiv cs.CL/cs.IR corpus via hybrid retrieval. 'grounded' = corpus has strong supporting evidence; 'bait' = corpus lacks real evidence (out-of-distribution), used to test whether the verifier flags hallucinated/unsupported claims.
